prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to planning permission processes, which are devolved matters managed by local authorities in Scotland, Northern Ireland, England, and Wales. This specific application and its context do not mention Scottish planning regulations, indicating it is likely a decision relevant to England only.
